title: G20 summit: Chinese president Xi Jinping likely to skip
description: India News: NEW DELHI: Chinese president Xi Jinping is likely to skip the G20 summit being organised in New Delhi next week, sources said on Thursday.
keywords: India News, India Latest News, News, Times Of India, Latest news
snippet: NEW DELHI: Chinese president Xi Jinping is likely to skip the G20 summit being organised in New Delhi next week, sources said on Thursday.More to follow.
